About.quote: From vague notions to shaping tomorrow. Through intelligent machines.
About.title: Knock, knock! Who's there?
About.bio1:
I'm Ha Minh Quan, also known as Quasar.
Born in 2002 and based in Vietnam. An AI Engineer driven by curiosity, building at the edge of intelligence and the systems that shape what comes next.
About.bio2: Designing and orchestrating end-to-end AI systems. From LLM-powered chatbots and multi-agent architectures to workflow automation — shaping how intelligent systems think, act, and scale. Strong in backend systems, API design, and crafting seamless frontends that bring intelligence to life. Experienced in large-scale document retrieval and prompt engineering, turning raw data into structured intelligence and meaningful outcomes.
About.tech2: Langchain, Langraph, Mem0, TensorFlow, Keras, Scikit-Learn, PyTorch, React, Surrealdb, Qdrant, Weaviate, Neo4j, MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis
About.service1Body: Building end-to-end AI chatbot systems — from RAG pipelines and agentic workflows to automation driven by real-world business logic. Working with complex, unstructured data, I focus on making models reliable, contextual, and aligned through strong prompt engineering.
About.service2Body: Designing AI system architectures that define how intelligence operates at scale. From multi-agent systems to LLM pipelines, I structure how components interact, reason, and evolve — while shaping backend, APIs, and data layers into cohesive, production-ready systems.
About.service3Body: Turning ideas into complete AI products. From frontend interfaces to backend services, I build systems where intelligence is seamlessly integrated — delivering applications that are usable, scalable, and ready for real-world deployment.

Footer.copyright: Ha Minh Quan. All rights reserved.
